description: Easiest documented route to first success per platform, scored by steps, friction, and estimated time.

model.est_minutes: sum of per-step base minutes by phase + per-flag extras; a heuristic estimate, not a vendor claim

rows.name: Hugging Face
rows.outcome: Unresolved until a human chooses the product and intent; the repository candidate can end with a newly created model repository page, while other products have different outcomes.
rows.route: Create a Hub model repository in the web UI

rows.name: JetBrains
rows.outcome: The wizard-generated Gradle plugin project starts the target IntelliJ Platform IDE in a standalone development instance with the plugin loaded.
rows.route: IntelliJ Platform Plugin SDK first local plugin run

rows.name: Netlify
rows.outcome: Netlify has published the dropped project and exposed it at a unique preview URL ending in netlify.app.
rows.route: Publish an existing folder through logged-in Netlify Drop

rows.name: OpenAI
rows.outcome: A JavaScript program sends the documented Responses API request and prints the model-generated text.
rows.route: primary path

rows.name: Resend
rows.outcome: After common key and domain setup, the developer uses a selected Resend quickstart to send a transactional email and receives that route's success response.
rows.route: Node.js SDK first transactional email

rows.name: Semgrep
rows.outcome: Semgrep Community Edition scans the official Python sample with the published Python command-injection ruleset and identifies the unsafe `os.system` call.
rows.route: primary path

rows.name: 1Password Developer
rows.outcome: After local app and CLI setup and creation of a 1Password Environment, the developer either reads mounted project secrets after biometric approval or completes an SSH and Git workflow with a 1Password
rows.route: Mount and read a local .env file from a 1Password Environment

rows.name: Airbyte
rows.outcome: PyAirbyte installs the missing Faker source connector, validates it, reads all selected generated-data streams into the result, and iterates over the returned records.
rows.route: PyAirbyte source-faker first local read

rows.name: CyberArk

rows.route: Conjur OSS Docker Compose store-and-retrieve demo

rows.name: Deepgram
rows.outcome: A cURL request to /v1/listen returns a JSON transcript of a hosted audio file.
rows.route: Transcribe pre-recorded audio (cURL)

rows.name: Mux
rows.outcome: A publicly playable Mux asset reaches ready state and streams in the browser through its playback ID.
rows.route: primary path

rows.name: NVIDIA Developer

rows.route: CUDA Toolkit sample run

rows.route: primary path
